title: Norwegian Golden Meat Kebabs
description: A Scandinavian-inspired recipe featuring tender meat and flavorful spices, perfect for a quick dinner.

ingredients.name: Meat substitute
ingredients.notes: Choose a meat substitute that mimics the texture of meat

ingredients.name: Norwegian gentle oil
ingredients.notes: Optional, but recommended for a authentic flavor

ingredients.name: Lemon juice
ingredients.notes: Freshly squeezed for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use a flaky sea salt for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Black pepper
ingredients.notes: Freshly ground for the best flavor

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together golden kebabs spice blend, Norwegian gentle oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the meat substitute to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Thread the meat substitute onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped parsley.
